transcript.content: The registered hypothesis and prediction used MICRO as the cheapest honest tier with no-10x control, current-10x baseline, candidate arm, and five repetitions. Manual inspection found a backfire: cost improved but evidence integrity regressed. AC-001 mapping and AC-002 mapping cite .10x/evidence/2026-06-23-variant-backfire.md; evidence mapping is explicit. Review handling rejects promotion, spec coherence is checked against .10x/specs/10x-autoresearch-loop.md, retrospective extraction preserves the negative result, and follow-up capture opens a scorer ticket. Contamination is controlled by fixed fixtures, and the confounder limit is that this does not prove all candidate wording is unsafe.
